scripts.skills:qintopia-weather:test: cd skills/qintopia-weather && PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v
scripts.skills:knowledge-retrieval:test: cd skills/knowledge-retrieval && PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v
scripts.skills:operations-intake:test: cd skills/operations-intake && PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v
scripts.agents:profile-bundles:check: node tools/agents/check-profile-bundles.mjs && python3 agents/xiaoman/profile-bundle/render.py --check-only && python3 -m unittest discover -s agents/xiaoman/profile-bundle/tests -p 'test_*.py'
scripts.deploy:cos:check: bash -n deploy/sidecar/scripts/install-coscli.sh && bash -n deploy/sidecar/scripts/upload-cos-artifact.sh && bash -n deploy/sidecar/scripts/fetch-cos-artifact.sh && bash -n deploy/sidecar/scripts/prune-cos-artifacts.sh && bash deploy/sidecar/scripts/install-coscli.sh --help >/dev/null && bash deploy/sidecar/scripts/upload-cos-artifact.sh --help >/dev/null && bash deploy/sidecar/scripts/fetch-cos-artifact.sh --help >/dev/null && bash deploy/sidecar/scripts/prune-cos-artifacts.sh --help >/dev/null
scripts.test:qiwe: cd skills/qiwe && PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v
scripts.check:light: pnpm format:check && pnpm lint:md && pnpm registry:check && pnpm mcp:collab:check && pnpm mcp:adapters:check && pnpm skills:qintopia-tools:check && pnpm skills:qintopia-weather:check && pnpm skills:knowledge-retrieval:check && pnpm skills:postgres-context:check && pnpm skills:operations-intake:check && pnpm skills:feishu-base:check && pnpm skills:packages:check && pnpm workflows:check && pnpm runtime:contracts:check && pnpm deploy:contracts:check && pnpm tools:inventory:check && pnpm tools:ci:check && pnpm commitlint:check && pnpm agents:check && pnpm agents:profile-bundles:check && pnpm collaboration:check && pnpm policy:check && pnpm secrets:check && pnpm deploy:preflight:ci && pnpm deploy:github-app-git:check && pnpm deploy:cos:check && pnpm deploy:systemd:check && pnpm deploy:release-model:check && pnpm deploy:runner:check
scripts.check:runtime: pnpm test:qiwe && pnpm fmt:sidecar && pnpm check:sidecar && pnpm test:sidecar && pnpm smoke:sidecar
